text.title: Text to Speak
text.description: The text content to convert to speech (max ~5000 characters). Supports sentences, paragraphs, and punctuation for natural pauses.

voice.title: Voice Preset
voice.description: Voice style: narrator (US English), friendly (warm US), professional (British), energetic (upbeat US), soft (slow US), australian, indian

speed.title: Speed Multiplier
speed.description: Playback speed factor (0.5 = half speed, 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double speed). Note: client-side speed adjustment is applied — gTTS generates at normal speed.

lang.title: Language
lang.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g., en, es, fr, de, it, pt, ja, ko, zh-CN). Default: en

action.title: Action
action.description: What to do: 'synthesize' (default) generates audio, 'list_voices' returns available voices, 'list_languages' returns supported languages
